cashInflowIncome.description: Sum of cash inflow transactions identified as income.

cashOutflowTransfers.description: Sum of cash outflow transactions identified as transfers.

cashOutflowTotalWithdrawalCountRatio.description: Ratio of Total Withdrawal count to total transactions count.

cashOutflowWithdrawals.description: Sum of cash outflow transactions identified as checks and withdrawals.

cashOutflow.description: Sum of all cash outflow transactions.

cashflowRatio.description: Cash inflow divided by cash outflow.

cashOutflowExpenses.description: Sum of cash outflow transactions identified as expenses.

adjustedCashInflow.description: Sum of all cash inflow transactions (excluding large amounts), grouped by Currency.

cashLeftover.description: Cash inflow subtracted by cash outflow.

cashOutflowDebitServicing.description: Sum of cash outflow transactions identified as repayments of debt.

cashOutflowWithdrawalToExpenseCountRatio.description: Ratio of Cash withdrawal count to Expense transaction count.

adjustedCashflowRatio.description: Cash inflow (excluding large amounts) divided by cash outflow (excluding large amounts).

cashInflowTransfers.description: Sum of cash inflow transactions identified as transfers.

cashInflowDepositCountRatio.description: Ratio of Total Deposit count to total transactions count.

adjustedCashOutflow.description: Sum of all cash outflow transactions (excluding large amounts), grouped by Currency.

cashInflowDeposits.description: Sum of cash inflow transactions identified as deposits (excluding income).

adjustedCashInflowTransfers.description: Sum of cash inflow transactions identified as transfers (excluding large amounts), grouped by Currency.

adjustedCashOutflowDebitServicing.description: Sum of cash outflow transactions identified as repayments of debt (excluding large amounts), grouped by Currency.

adjustedCashLeftover.description: Cash inflow (excluding large amounts) subtracted by cash outflow (excluding large amounts).

adjustedCashOutflowTransfers.description: Sum of cash outflow transactions identified as transfers (excluding large amounts), grouped by Currency.

cashOutflowOtherDebits.description: Sum of cash outflow transactions identified as other debits.

adjustedCashOutflowOtherDebits.description: Sum of cash outflow transactions identified as other debits (excluding large amounts), grouped by Currency.

adjustedCashOutflowWithdrawals.description: Sum of cash outflow transactions identified as checks and withdrawals (excluding large amounts), grouped by Currency.

adjustedCashInflowOtherCredits.description: Sum of cash inflow transactions identified as other credits (excluding large amounts), grouped by Currency.

cashInflow.description: Sum of all cash inflow transactions.

cashInflowOtherCredits.description: Sum of cash inflow transactions identified as other credits.

timePeriod.description: Time intervals to consider up to the number of days the application was requested.

adjustedCashInflowDeposits.description: Sum of cash inflow transactions identified as deposits (excluding income and large amounts), grouped by Currency.

adjustedCashOutflowExpenses.description: Sum of cash outflow transactions identified as expenses (excluding large amounts), grouped by Currency.

cashOutflowCashWithdrawalCountRatio.description: Ratio of Cash withdrawal count  to total withdrawal count.

adjustedCashInflowIncome.description: Sum of cash inflow transactions identified as income (excluding large amounts), grouped by Currency.
